confidence_flags: doc_page_start/end are inferred 1:1 from the printed sheet sequence A-01..A-25 (each row maps to exactly one document page); not separately printed as page numbers on this sheet itself
warnings: Sheet A-01 contains 3 distinct patterns side by side, inventoried first: this per-sheet architectural index (left column 'รายการแบบสถาปัตยกรรม (A)'), a material spec list (middle column 'รายการวัสดุ'), and a drawing-symbol legend (right column 'รายการสัญลักษณ์ประกอบแบบ'). Split into 3 sibling files: _หน้า03_index.json (this file), _หน้า03_material_list.json, _หน้า03_symbol_legend.json.

This house's A-01..A-25 index (25 sheets) maps exactly 1:1 onto source pages 03-27 (png03=A-01 doc_page1 ... png27=A-25 doc_page25), matching the task's assigned architecture page range exactly. Cross-checked against the sheet_code printed in each page's own title-block bottom-right corner while reading every page 03-27 directly — no gaps or reordering found.

This is a 2-story house (บ้านครอบครัวไทยร่วมสมัย 3): unlike the 1-story sister houses' 19-sheet architecture sets, this one has TWO floor plan sheets (A-04 แปลนพื้นชั้น 1, A-05 แปลนพื้นชั้น 2), 4 elevations each on its own sheet (A-07..A-10) instead of 2-per-sheet, 3 sections each on its own sheet (A-11..A-13) instead of 2-per-sheet, a dedicated 2nd-floor guardrail detail sheet (A-21 แบบขยายราวกันตก, not present in the 1-story houses), and the main stair (ST.2) spans 2 full sheets (A-19 plan views + A-20 section/hardware details) since it connects two full stories via a switchback (dog-leg) flight, vs. the 1-story houses' single small ST.1/ST.2 porch-step details.

Title block: 'แบบบ้านสานฝัน ของขวัญปีใหม่ คนไทยมีความสุข' / 'บ้านครอบครัวไทยร่วมสมัย 3', เลขที่แบบ AR 58003, วันที่ 19/10/59, sheet A-01 of 25 — this is the 3rd sister design in the same government housing program as house 1 (AR 58001, 1-story) and house 2 (AR 58002, 1-story).
